parameters.query:
SELECT a.id, a.activity_type, a.opp_id, a.contact_name, a.contact_org,
  a.notes, a.logged_by, a.follow_up_date, a.outcome, a.logged_at,
  o.opp_title
FROM gda_bd_activities a
LEFT JOIN gda_opportunity_tracker o ON o.id = a.opp_id
WHERE ($1::integer IS NULL OR a.opp_id = $1::integer)
ORDER BY a.logged_at DESC
LIMIT $2;

SELECT
  a.opp_id, o.opp_title,
  COUNT(*) as total_touches,
  MAX(a.logged_at) as last_touch,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE a.activity_type = 'call') as calls,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE a.activity_type = 'meeting') as meetings,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE a.activity_type = 'email') as emails,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE a.activity_type = 'proposal') as proposals,
  STRING_AGG(DISTINCT a.contact_name, ', ' ORDER BY a.contact_name) as contacts_engaged,
  MIN(a.logged_at) as first_touch,
  (CURRENT_DATE - MAX(a.logged_at)::date) as days_since_last_touch
FROM gda_bd_activities a
LEFT JOIN gda_opportunity_tracker o ON o.id = a.opp_id
WHERE ($1::integer IS NULL OR a.opp_id = $1::integer)
GROUP BY a.opp_id, o.opp_title
ORDER BY last_touch DESC
LIMIT 20;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({error: 'Invalid action. Use: log, list, opp_touches, setup'}) }}
